markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To align on pricing and operational details for the GrowthX partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Pricing is the main blocker.** Binti finds the proposal "significantly above" expectations and is cost-conscious after a recent hiring sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [**Significant discount is possible.** GrowthX will offer a discount on both the monthly fee and one-time setup fee, citing a personal connection (Felicia is engaged to a GrowthX contact) as the reason for flexibility.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [**Binti to propose a target price by Feb 13.** GrowthX will provide a final answer by Feb 14, aiming for a contract signature by Feb 20 to meet the March 2 kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [**The model is a 50-day trial within a 6+ month commitment.** Binti can opt out before the end of Phase 1 (approx. 50 days) if not satisfied with the content quality and roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

## Topics

### Pricing & Contract Negotiation

  - [Binti's primary concern is the proposal's price, which is "significantly above" expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Binti is highly cost-conscious and focused on profitability after a large hiring sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [GrowthX confirmed flexibility on pricing due to the personal connection.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
      - [**Offer:** A significant discount on both the monthly fee and the one-time setup fee.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [**Constraint:** The contract's "termination for breach" clause is non-negotiable, as it is standard for all clients.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Binti's CFO is particularly concerned about the one-time setup fee, as the company just incurred other large one-time payouts (e.g., hiring bonuses).](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)

### Partnership Model & Workflow

  - [**Communication:** A shared Slack channel and Notion workspace for daily updates, drafts, and feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
    1.  [**Weeks 1–4:** Develop foundational artifacts (personas, competitive analysis) and calibrate with Binti.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
    2.  [**Week 4+:** Begin drafting articles. Binti provides feedback via Google Docs comments.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
    3.  [**Publishing:** GrowthX stages approved articles in Binti's CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**Goal:** Drive organic traffic via search-optimized content.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**Method:** Keyword analysis targets high-volume terms and opportunities to outrank competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**Format:** Text-based articles (e.g., guides, programmatic content). Video is not included but can be discussed later.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)

### Technical Implementation (WordPress)

  - [Binti's site is on WordPress; a potential platform migration is being evaluated.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [**Requirement:** Binti's contractors must create a simple WordPress template for GrowthX to publish into.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [**Template needs:** Table of Contents, author/date fields, table support, and a cover image.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [**Context:** Binti noted past difficulties with its contractors, which may require careful planning for this step.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [**CMS Recommendations:** GrowthX suggested Webflow and Framer as good alternatives to WordPress for Binti's needs.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Binti:** Propose a target price for the monthly fee and one-time setup fee by **Feb 13**.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Provide a final answer on the proposed price by **Feb 14**.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [**Both:** If pricing aligns, complete legal review by **Feb 19** and sign the contract by **Feb 20** to meet the **March 2** kickoff date.](https://fathom.video/share/xqhZa-_LXW_zTKCgLNSXDBsJYfJRCjA5?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
